description:
Sync or back up your folders on your Windows PC or Mac for easy access anytime, anywhere


Fixed issues
- Fixed an issue where signing in to BeeStation for desktop could fail when using a self-signed certificate.
- Fixed an issue where RAW files were not transferred when migrating JPEG + RAW photos from iCloud.
- Fixed an issue where the video portion of Live Photos was not transferred during iCloud photo migration.
macOS
- Fixed an issue where BeeStation for desktop might not sync files properly when uploading images on macOS 15.4.
- Fixed an issue where files uploaded via BeeFiles did not appear in the BeeFiles folder on the computer.
Windows
- Fixed an issue where BeeStation for desktop might not sync files properly when uploading images to BeeStation.
